sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58179" key="*knido/kokkos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Κνῐδόκοκκος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n58179.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κόκκος Κνίδιος</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:8:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
